positive: A celestial, abstract landscape composition featuring a majestic, stylized lion silhouette standing atop a crescent moon. The scene is dominated by deep indigo and ultramarine blues blending into bioluminescent cosmic purples and vibrant magenta streaks. Galactic dust clouds drift around the lion's mane and the lunar surface, rendered with sharp, high-contrast luminescence and fine star-field details. The overall style is neo-mystic modern graphic art, with clean, solid vector lines complementing the ethereal cosmic wash. The composition must be perfectly balanced and centered for apparel printing, suitable for a repeat or large-scale single print. Highly detailed, vibrant colors, volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry, smooth gradient transitions.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, signature, watermark, dirty, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, poorly rendered, out of focus, cartoon, photo, realistic photo, logo, copyright
